codigo:
COMMENT_60_TEMPLATE = (login) =>
    `👋 @${login} This issue has been open with no human activity for ${daysToComment} days. Is this issue still relevant? If there is no human response or activity within the next ${daysToLabel - daysToComment} days, this issue will be labeled as \`idle\`.`

removeQuotes = (v) =>
      v.trim().replace(",", "").replace(/'/g, "").replace(/"/g, "")

generateMarkdown = (packages) =>
   packages
    .map(({name, link}) => `- [${name}](${link})`)
    .join('\n')

function useSetImmediate() {                                                                              // 38
  if (! global.setImmediate)                                                                              // 39
    return null;                                                                                          // 40
  else {                                                                                                  // 41
    var setImmediate = function (fn) {                                                                    // 42
      global.setImmediate(fn);                                                                            // 43
    };                                                                                                    // 44
    setImmediate.implementation = 'setImmediate';                                                         // 45
    return setImmediate;                                                                                  // 46
  }                                                                                                       // 47
}

function isStringAndStartsWith(string, putativeStart) {                                                 // 86
    return (typeof string === "string" &&                                                                 // 87
            string.substring(0, putativeStart.length) === putativeStart);                                 // 88
  }

function useTimeout() {                                                                                   // 129
  var setImmediate = function (fn) {                                                                      // 130
    global.setTimeout(fn, 0);                                                                             // 131
  };                                                                                                      // 132
  setImmediate.implementation = 'setTimeout';                                                             // 133
  return setImmediate;                                                                                    // 134
}

withoutInvocation = function (f) {                                                                    // 1
  if (Package.ddp) {                                                                                      // 2
    var _CurrentInvocation = Package.ddp.DDP._CurrentInvocation;                                          // 3
    if (_CurrentInvocation.get() && _CurrentInvocation.get().isSimulation)                                // 4
      throw new Error("Can't set timers inside simulations");                                             // 5
    return function () { _CurrentInvocation.withValue(null, f); };                                        // 6
  }                                                                                                       // 7
  else                                                                                                    // 8
    return f;                                                                                             // 9
}

releaseReadyHold = function () {                                                                      // 13
  readyHoldsCount--;                                                                                      // 14
  maybeReady();                                                                                           // 15
}

maybeReady = function () {                                                                            // 18
  if (isReady || !isLoadingCompleted || readyHoldsCount > 0)                                              // 19
    return;                                                                                               // 20
                                                                                                          // 21
  isReady = true;                                                                                         // 22
                                                                                                          // 23
  // Run startup callbacks                                                                                // 24
  while (callbackQueue.length)                                                                            // 25
    (callbackQueue.shift())();                                                                            // 26
}

Ctor = function(){}

isJQueryCallee = (node) =>
  // $()
  (node.type === 'Identifier' && jQueryNames.has(node.name)) || // Template.instance().$()
  (node.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
    node.property.type === 'Identifier' &&
    node.property.name === '$' &&
    node.object.type === 'CallExpression' &&
    node.object.callee.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
    node.object.callee.object.type === 'Identifier' &&
    node.object.callee.object.name === 'Template' &&
    getPropertyName(node.object.callee.property) === 'instance')

isRelevantTemplateCallExpression = (node) =>
  node.type === 'CallExpression' &&
  node.callee.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.callee.object.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.callee.object.object.type === 'Identifier' &&
  node.callee.object.object.name === 'Template' &&
  getPropertyName(node.callee.property) === 'onCreated'

isInRelevantTemplateScope = (ancestors) =>
  ancestors.some(isRelevantTemplateCallExpression)

isSessionGetCallExpression = (node) =>
  node.type === 'CallExpression' &&
  node.callee.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.callee.object.type === 'Identifier' &&
  node.callee.object.name === 'Session' &&
  ((!node.callee.computed &&
    node.callee.property.type === 'Identifier' &&
    node.callee.property.name === 'get') ||
    (node.callee.computed &&
      node.callee.property.type === 'Literal' &&
      node.callee.property.value === 'get'))

isJQueryIdentifier = (node) =>
  node.type === 'Identifier' && jQueryNames.has(node.name)

isRelevantTemplateCallExpression = (node) =>
  node.type === 'CallExpression' &&
  node.callee.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.callee.object.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.callee.object.object.type === 'Identifier' &&
  node.callee.object.object.name === 'Template' &&
  relevantTemplatePropertyNames.has(getPropertyName(node.callee.property))

isInRelevantTemplateScope = (ancestors) =>
  ancestors.some(isRelevantTemplateCallExpression)

isTemplateMemberExpression = (node) =>
  node.object.type === 'MemberExpression' &&
  node.object.object.type === 'Identifier' &&
  node.object.object.name === 'Template' &&
  (node.object.property.type === 'Identifier' ||
    node.object.property.type === 'Literal') &&
  node.property.type === 'Identifier' &&
  templateProps.has(node.property.name)

getNameOfProperty = (node) =>
  node.type === 'Identifier' ? node.name : node.value

getErrorMessage = (expected) =>
  `Invalid template name, expected name to be in ${expected}`

getMin = () =>
  totals.reduce((min, total, i) => total < totals[min] ? i : min, 0)

function highlight(js) { return js .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/\/\/(.*)/gm, '//$1') .replace(/('.*?')/gm, '$1') .replace(/(\d+\.\d+)/gm, '$1') .replace(/(\d+)/gm, '$1') .replace(/\bnew[ \t]+(\w+)/gm, 'new $1') .replace(/\b(function|new|throw|return|var|if|else)\b/gm, '$1') }
repeat = function(s, n) { return new Array(n).join(s); }

function isNodeInternal (line) {
    return (~line.indexOf('(timers.js:')) ||
      (~line.indexOf('(events.js:'))      ||
      (~line.indexOf('(node.js:'))        ||
      (~line.indexOf('(module.js:'))      ||
      (~line.indexOf('GeneratorFunctionPrototype.next (native)')) ||
      false
  }
isWindows = () => os.platform() === 'win32'
isMac = () => os.platform() === 'darwin'
isLinux = () => os.platform() === 'linux'

shouldSetupExecPath = () =>
  !process.env.npm_config_ignore_meteor_setup_exec_path

appendPathToFile = async file =>
    fsPromises.appendFile(`${rootPath}/${file}`, `${exportCommand}\n`)

findUserById =
  async id => await Meteor.users.findOneAsync(id)

findOne = (...args) => Meteor.isClient
      ? self.users.findOne(...args)
      : self.users.findOneAsync(...args)
reconnectHandler = () => onReconnectCalls++

getUserById =
  async (id, options) =>
    await Meteor.users.findOneAsync(id, Accounts._addDefaultFieldSelector(options))
pluckAddresses = (emails = []) => emails.map(email => email.address)

resetToOldToken = () =>
              Accounts._setLoginToken(user._id, this.connection, oldToken)

simplePollAsync = (fn) =>
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => simplePoll(fn,resolve,reject))

addSkipCaseInsensitiveChecksForTest = (value, test, expect) =>
    Meteor.call('addSkipCaseInsensitiveChecksForTest', value)

removeSkipCaseInsensitiveChecksForTest = (value, test, expect) =>
    Meteor.call('removeSkipCaseInsensitiveChecksForTest', value)

expectUserNotFound = (test, expect) =>
    expectError(new Meteor.Error(403, "User not found"), test, expect)

waitForLoggedOutStep = (test, expect) => pollUntil(
    expect,
    () => Meteor.userId() === null,
    10 * 1000,
    100
  )

getUserHashRounds = user =>
    Number(user.services.password.bcrypt.substring(4, 6))
pluckAddresses = (emails = []) => emails.map(email => email.address)

getUserById = async (id, options) =>
    Meteor.users.findOneAsync(id, Accounts._addDefaultFieldSelector(options))
hasPasswordService = () => !!Package['accounts-password']
hasPasswordlessService = () => !!Package['accounts-passwordless']

dropdown = () =>
  hasPasswordService() || hasPasswordlessService() || getLoginServices().length > 1
_set = (key, value) => Session.set(KEY_PREFIX + key, value)
isInsert = name => name.includes('insert')
add = names => names && names.forEach(name => union[name] = 1)
getChar = val => BASE_64_CHARS.charAt(val)
getVal = ch => ch === '=' ? -1 : BASE_64_VALS[ch]

arrayToAscii = arr => arr
  .reduce(
    (prev, charCode) => prev.push(String.fromCharCode(charCode)) && prev, []
  ).join('')
leftChildIdx = i => i * 2 + 1
rightChildIdx = i => i * 2 + 2
parentIdx = i => (i - 1) >> 1
readUtf8FileSync = filename => readFileSync(filename, 'utf8')
identity = value => value

sri = (sri, mode) =>
  (sri && mode) ? ` integrity="sha512-${sri}" crossorigin="${mode}"` : ''
function escapeStringChar(match) { return '\\' + escapes[match]; }
function isObject(value) { return value != null && typeof value === 'object'; }
function toStringSafe(value) { return value == null ? '' : (value + ''); }
function baseValues(object, props) { return props.map(k => object[k]); }
function isError(value) { return value instanceof Error || (isObject(value) && value.name === 'Error'); }
isObject = value => typeof value === 'object' && value !== null

baseIsArguments = item =>
  isObject(item) &&
  Object.prototype.toString.call(item) === '[object Arguments]'
testFunction = () => {}
TestInstanceChild = function () {}
testFunction = () => {}
TestInstanceChild = function () {}

checksAllArguments = (f, ...args) =>
    Match._failIfArgumentsAreNotAllChecked(f, {}, args, 'test')
TestInstanceChild = function () {}
tick = timeout => clock.tick(timeout)
testDocCount = async count => test.equal(await coll.find({}).count(), count)
onMessage = message => messages.push(EJSON.parse(message))
function noop() {}

shouldSkip = resource =>
  resource.type === 'dynamic js' ||
    (resource.type === 'json' &&
     (resource.url.endsWith('.map') ||
      resource.url.endsWith('.stats.json?meteor_js_resource=true')))
nextLine = () => lines[i++]
eof = () => i >= lines.length
ctor = function(){}

Carousel = function (element, options) {
    this.$element = $(element)
    this.$indicators = this.$element.find('.carousel-indicators')
    this.options = options
    this.options.pause == 'hover' && this.$element
      .on('mouseenter', $.proxy(this.pause, this))
      .on('mouseleave', $.proxy(this.cycle, this))
  }

function ScrollSpy(element, options) {
    var process = $.proxy(this.process, this)
      , $element = $(element).is('body') ? $(window) : $(element)
      , href
    this.options = $.extend({}, $.fn.scrollspy.defaults, options)
    this.$scrollElement = $element.on('scroll.scroll-spy.data-api', process)
    this.selector = (this.options.target
      || ((href = $(element).attr('href')) && href.replace(/.*(?=#[^\s]+$)/, '')) //strip for ie7
      || '') + ' .nav li > a'
    this.$body = $('body')
    this.refresh()
    this.process()
  }

Typeahead = function (element, options) {
    this.$element = $(element)
    this.options = $.extend({}, $.fn.typeahead.defaults, options)
    this.matcher = this.options.matcher || this.matcher
    this.sorter = this.options.sorter || this.sorter
    this.highlighter = this.options.highlighter || this.highlighter
    this.updater = this.options.updater || this.updater
    this.source = this.options.source
    this.$menu = $(this.options.menu)
    this.shown = false
    this.listen()
  }

Affix = function (element, options) {
    this.options = $.extend({}, $.fn.affix.defaults, options)
    this.$window = $(window)
      .on('scroll.affix.data-api', $.proxy(this.checkPosition, this))
      .on('click.affix.data-api',  $.proxy(function () { setTimeout($.proxy(this.checkPosition, this), 1) }, this))
    this.$element = $(element)
    this.checkPosition()
  }
function d3_Map() {}
function d3_Set() {}
function d3_dispatch() {}
function d3_noop() {}
function d3_Color() {}
emptyFunction = function(){}
isStr	=  function (v) { return $.type(v) === "string"; }
function g (f) { return f; }
function g (f) { return f; }
function calc (x,y) { return (parseInt(x,10) / parseInt(y,10) * 100).toFixed(); }
function nbi() { return new BigInteger(null); }
function int2char(n) { return BI_RM.charAt(n); }
function nbv(i) { var r = nbi(); r.fromInt(i); return r; }
function bnNegate() { var r = nbi(); BigInteger.ZERO.subTo(this,r); return r; }
function bnAbs() { return (this.s<0)?this.negate():this; }
function Classic(m) { this.m = m; }
function cRevert(x) { return x; }
function cReduce(x) { x.divRemTo(this.m,null,x); }
function cMulTo(x,y,r) { x.multiplyTo(y,r); this.reduce(r); }
function cSqrTo(x,r) { x.squareTo(r); this.reduce(r); }

resolver = (res, err) => err ? reject(err) : resolve(res)
_sleep = (ms) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
Parent = function () {}
Child = function () {}

CssCompiler = function () {
}
isRelative = path => path && path.charAt(0) !== '/'

toOSPath =
  p => process.platform === 'win32' ? p.replace(/\//g, '\\') : p

toStandardPath =
  p => process.platform === 'win32' ? p.replace(/\\/g, '/') : p

pathJoin =
  (a, b) => toStandardPath(path.join(toOSPath(a), toOSPath(b)))

pathDirname =
  p => toStandardPath(path.dirname(toOSPath(p)))

pathRelative =
  (p1, p2) => toStandardPath(path.relative(toOSPath(p1), toOSPath(p2)))

stylesheet = backgroundPath => (
    `@media (min--moz-device-pixel-ratio: 1.5),\n\
    (-o-min-device-pixel-ratio: 3/2),\n\
    (-webkit-min-device-pixel-ratio: 1.5),\n\
    (min-device-pixel-ratio: 1.5),\n\
    (min-resolution: 1.5dppx) \n\
    { .foobar { background-image: url(${backgroundPath}); } }`
  )

noop = () => null
invalidTransform = doc => doc._id
sortFunction = (doc1, doc2) => doc2.a - doc1.a
forwardCmp = (a, b) => a - b
backwardCmp = (a, b) => -1 * forwardCmp(a, b)
class ObserveHandle {}
pathFromIndices = indices => `${indices.join(',')},`
makeMongoLegal = name => "EJSON" + name
unmakeMongoLegal = name => name.substr(5)
SwitchedToQuery = function () {}
isFunction = fn => test.equal(typeof fn, 'function')
extension1 = function() {}
extension2 = function() {}
function m(doc) { return doc.a; }
difference = (arr1, arr2) => arr1.filter(x => !arr2.includes(x))

statFileFilter = f =>
    f.type === "json" &&
    f.absolutePath &&
    f.absolutePath.endsWith(".stats.json")

fail = err => 
    Meteor._debug(`Error from OAuth popup: ${JSON.stringify(err)}`)

usingOAuthEncryption = () =>
  OAuthEncryption && OAuthEncryption.keyIsLoaded()

isEmpty = obj => [Object, Array].includes((obj || {}).constructor) && !Object.entries((obj || {})).length
lengthOrZero = (field) => field ? field.length : 0
class CompileError {}

asyncGet =
  (url, opt) =>
    new Promise((resolve, reject) =>
      HTTP.get(url, opt, (err, res) =>
        err
          ? reject(err)
          : resolve(res)
      ))

getDirectories = async source =>
  (await readdir(source, { withFileTypes: true }))
    .filter(dirent => dirent.isDirectory())
    .map(dirent => dirent.name)

removeQuotes =
          (v) => v
            .trim()
            .replace(',', '')
            .replace(/'/g, '')
            .replace(/"/g, '')
function info(msg)  { console.log(`${c.cyan}\u2192${c.reset} ${msg}`); }
function ok(msg)    { console.log(`${c.green}\u2713${c.reset} ${msg}`); }
function warn(msg)  { console.log(`${c.yellow}\u26A0${c.reset} ${msg}`); }
function err(msg)   { console.error(`${c.red}\u2717${c.reset} ${msg}`); }

function usage() {
  console.log(`Usage:
  npm run checkout:pr -- <PR-number>
  npm run checkout:pr -- <PR-URL>
  npm run checkout:pr -- <user>:<branch>
  npm run checkout:pr -- <fork-repo-url> <branch>
  npm run checkout:pr -- git@github.com:<user>/<repo>.git <branch>

Prepares a local branch from a fork contribution for testing and review.

Examples:
  npm run checkout:pr -- 123
  npm run checkout:pr -- https://github.com/meteor/meteor/pull/<PR-number>
  npm run checkout:pr -- <user>:<branch>
  npm run checkout:pr -- <fork-repo-url> <branch>
  npm run checkout:pr -- git@github.com:<user>/<repo>.git <branch>`);
  process.exit(1);
}

getMin = () =>
  totals.reduce((min, total, i) => total < totals[min] ? i : min, 0)
replaceAll = (str, search, replace) => str.split(search).join(replace)
class ConsoleBase {}

yellow  =
  (text, ...values) =>
     `\x1b[33m${ String.raw({ raw: text }, ...values) }\x1b[0m`

red =
  (text, ...values) =>
    `\x1b[31m${ String.raw({ raw: text }, ...values) }\x1b[0m`

purple =
  (text, ...values) =>
    `\x1b[35m${ String.raw({ raw: text }, ...values) }\x1b[0m`

green =
  (text, ...values) =>
    `\x1b[32m${ String.raw({ raw: text }, ...values) }\x1b[0m`

blue =
  (text, ...values) =>
    `\x1b[34m${ String.raw({ raw: text }, ...values) }\x1b[0m`

function Minifier () {}
function Minifier () {}
function Minifier () {}

function DestructuringErrors() {
  this.shorthandAssign =
  this.trailingComma =
  this.parenthesizedAssign =
  this.parenthesizedBind =
  this.doubleProto =
    -1
}

tryContextual = (k, noLineBreak = false) => {
    const start = this.start, startLoc = this.startLoc
    if (!this.eatContextual(k)) return false
    if (this.type !== tt.parenL && (!noLineBreak || !this.canInsertSemicolon())) return true
    if (method.key) this.unexpected()
    method.computed = false
    method.key = this.startNodeAt(start, startLoc)
    method.key.name = k
    this.finishNode(method.key, "Identifier")
    return false
  }

class TokenType {
  constructor(label, conf = {}) {
    this.label = label
    this.keyword = conf.keyword
    this.beforeExpr = !!conf.beforeExpr
    this.startsExpr = !!conf.startsExpr
    this.isLoop = !!conf.isLoop
    this.isAssign = !!conf.isAssign
    this.prefix = !!conf.prefix
    this.postfix = !!conf.postfix
    this.binop = conf.binop || null
    this.updateContext = null
  }
}
function DummyCompiler() {}

function DestructuringErrors() {
  this.shorthandAssign =
  this.trailingComma =
  this.parenthesizedAssign =
  this.parenthesizedBind =
  this.doubleProto =
    -1
}

tryContextual = (k, noLineBreak = false) => {
    const start = this.start, startLoc = this.startLoc
    if (!this.eatContextual(k)) return false
    if (this.type !== tt.parenL && (!noLineBreak || !this.canInsertSemicolon())) return true
    if (method.key) this.unexpected()
    method.computed = false
    method.key = this.startNodeAt(start, startLoc)
    method.key.name = k
    this.finishNode(method.key, "Identifier")
    return false
  }

class TokenType {
  constructor(label, conf = {}) {
    this.label = label
    this.keyword = conf.keyword
    this.beforeExpr = !!conf.beforeExpr
    this.startsExpr = !!conf.startsExpr
    this.isLoop = !!conf.isLoop
    this.isAssign = !!conf.isAssign
    this.prefix = !!conf.prefix
    this.postfix = !!conf.postfix
    this.binop = conf.binop || null
    this.updateContext = null
  }
}
function DummyCompiler() {}
Compiler = function () {}
isOSX = async () => (await host()).split(".", 2).join(".") === "os.osx"

meteorToolVersion = function (v) {
    return {
      _id: 'VID' + v.replace(/\./g, ''),
      packageName: 'meteor-tool',
      testName: null,
      version: v,
      publishedBy: null,
      description: 'The Meteor command-line tool',
      git: undefined,
      dependencies: { meteor: { constraint: null, references: [{ arch: 'os' }, { arch: 'web.browser' }, { arch: 'web.cordova' }] } },
      source: null,
      lastUpdated: null,
      published: null,
      isTest: false,
      debugOnly: false,
      prodOnly: false,
      testOnly: false,
      containsPlugins: false
    };
  }
notHidden = function (f) { return f[0] !== '.'; }

normalizeModernConfig = (r = false) => Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(DEFAULT_MODERN).map(([k, def]) => [
    k,
    r === true
      ? def
      : r === false || r?.[k] === false
        ? false
        : typeof r?.[k] === 'object'
          ? { ...r[k] }
          : def,
  ]),
)
getKey = () => this.constructor._getBrowserStackKey()
s = status => `${status.signal || status.code || "???"}`
attrSafe = attr => (attr || "").replace('"', """)
durationForOutput = durationMs => durationMs / 1000
getAslStore = () => global.__METEOR_ASYNC_LOCAL_STORAGE.getStore()
getValueFromAslStore = key => getAslStore()[key]
updateAslStore = (key, value) => getAslStore()[key] = value
Done = function () {}
k = (v) => utils.defaultOrderKeyForReleaseVersion(v)
makeUnique = (arr) => [...new Set(arr)]

removeQuotes = (v) =>
      v.trim().replace(",", "").replace(/'/g, "").replace(/"/g, "")

getDocsUrl = (version = "") =>
  `https://release-${version}.docs-online.meteor.com/`

generateMarkdown = (packages) =>
  packages.map(({ name, link }) => `### [${name}](${link}) {#${name}}`).join("\n")
